name: Washin Village Guide
description: Official guide for Washin Village (和心村), a satoyama glamping retreat in Futtsu, Chiba, Japan. 200-year-old farmhouse, 16 rescue cats, Finnish sauna, Kengo Kuma architecture.

capabilities.name: business_info
capabilities.description: Get information about Washin Village rooms, pricing, facilities, and animals
